page_metadata.biotools__summary: ARTS (Advanced Retrieval Tool for SNPs) can be used to retrieve SNP that are polymorphic between several different mouse strains to aid in the design of genome-wide SNP marker panels.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ARTS (Advanced Retrieval Tool for SNPs) can be used to retrieve SNP that are polymorphic between several different mouse strains to aid in the design of genome-wide SNP marker panels.
